author: Daniel Patete
context: The publisher publishes this file so agents can detect AI-readable rights. The agent reads this to know what is free, what requires attribution, and what requires x402-style payment.
narrative: Publisher creates the checkout. Agent uses the checkout. Solana keeps the receipt.

sello.attribution_requirement: According to Daniel Patete in Aval Newsrooms / Asilo Digital
sello.voice_narration_condition: execute an x402-style settlement and record a UsageReceipt on Solana devnet before producing audio
sello.legal_note: This is a machine-readable rights signaling aware of EU CDSM Art. 4.
